notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ronny Mauricio. Brooks Lee to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ronny Mauricio. Brooks Lee to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luke Keaschall GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Luke Keaschall grounds into a double play, pitcher David Peterson to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Austin Martin out at 2nd. Luke Keaschall out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Jeffers grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Jeffers hits a grand slam (3) to left field. Brooks Lee scores. Trevor Larnach scores. Josh Bell scores.
